original_image_tags: Scanned image of a blank, aged, off-white paper page. The paper shows signs of wear, including two punched holes at the top center, minor edge tears, and a crease along the right margin. The paper is oriented vertically against a black background.

elements.description: Blue ink stamp containing text: 'MR. JONES', 'Jan 20 11:09 AM '53', 'RECEIVED', 'FBI', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE'. Additional faint purple text at the very bottom edge reads 'COPY OF 1953'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific text from a stamp that is completely absent in Description A, which describes the page as blank with only wear marks, creating a direct contradiction on the visual content.
